title: Kiss from a Rose
why_this_song: Kiss from a Rose by Seal (1994) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: There used to be a graying tower alone on the sea
You became the light on the dark side of me
Now that your rose is in bloom
A light hits the gloom on the gray
I've been kissed by a rose on the gray

Choose the missing word:

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rose" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rose" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gray" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gray" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Won't you tell me, is that healthy, baby?
Now that your rose is in bloom

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Kiss from a Rose" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Kiss from a Rose" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Kiss from a Rose" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Kiss from a Rose" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Kiss from a Rose" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Kiss from a Rose", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Kiss from a Rose" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Kiss from a Rose" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Kiss from a Rose" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Kiss from a Rose" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Kiss from a Rose" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Kiss from a Rose"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Kiss from a Rose", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Kiss from a Rose", o que aconteceria?
